text:
I understand — you need to update the email on your account, but verification is stuck going to the old address you can't access.

Since this involves changing account access, it needs to go through identity verification with our security team before any update is made. I can't make this change directly or bypass the verification step.

I'm routing this to security ops for identity verification — they'll follow up with next steps to confirm your identity and get the new email set.

Novig Support
